summary: Mobile navigation refactor testing complete. All 14 features verified working correctly. Bottom nav shows 4 items (Emergency, Home, Alertas, Profile). Drawer menu opens from left with 7 module items. Asamblea correctly disabled with 'Pronto' label. Desktop admin sidebar unchanged.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (existing issue)
Console warning: GPS Error GeolocationPositionError - expected on test environment
Console warning: Could not fetch condominium modules - 403 error, defaulting to all enabled (existing issue)

critical_code_review_comments: ResidentLayout.jsx correctly implements 4-item bottom nav with BOTTOM_NAV_ITEMS array
Drawer menu (Sheet component) properly configured with 7 DRAWER_ITEMS including disabled Asamblea
handleBottomNavChange correctly maps 'home' to 'visits' tab and 'notifications' to dropdown
handleDrawerItemClick properly closes drawer and navigates (except for disabled asamblea)
BottomNav.js useIsMobile hook correctly hides nav on desktop (>1023px)
Drawer footer shows user name and apartment from user context
All data-testid attributes present for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 14 mobile nav features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile navigation refactor complete and tested. Bottom nav: Emergency (red center button), Home (maps to visits), Alertas (opens notifications dropdown), Profile. Drawer menu: Visits, Reservations, Directory, Cases, Docs, Finances, Asamblea (disabled). Desktop admin sidebar unchanged. All modules load content correctly via drawer navigation.

bottom_nav_4_items.home: Maps to visits tab, shows visits module content

drawer_menu.asamblea_disabled: Shows 'Pronto' label, click does not navigate
drawer_menu.footer: Shows user name and apartment (Residente de Prueba, A-101)
drawer_menu.navigation: Clicking item closes drawer and navigates to module

desktop_admin.mobile_nav_hidden: Mobile bottom nav not rendered on desktop viewport
